seo.title: Toni Mateos - Online Session Drummer | Professional Remote Drum Recording
seo.description: Hire a professional online session drummer with 35+ years of experience. Remote drum recording trusted by John Legend, Alejandro Sanz & Juanes. 1000+ albums recorded from Barcelona.

about.tagline: 35 years as an online session drummer for the world's top artists. Professional remote drum recording from Barcelona — trusted by John Legend, Alejandro Sanz and Juanes.
about.historyText: With 35 years of professional experience as a session drummer, I have had the privilege of recording with international artists including John Legend, Alejandro Sanz, and Juanes. My professional remote recording service delivers world-class drum tracks from my acoustically designed studio in Barcelona.
about.skillsSubtitle: Every beat tells a story. These are the skills that allow me to bring your music to life.
about.liveStageAlt: Drums on stage with dramatic lighting
about.studioAlt: Professional recording studio with acoustic drums

tutorials.whyTheseCoursesDesc: Luis del Toro and Alex Carretero are two of the most recognised mixing and recording engineers in the music industry. With years of experience working with top artists, these courses will give you the tools to achieve professional drum recordings and mixes, regardless of your level or equipment.

bd.whatIs: What is Beat Detective and what is it for?
bd.proscons: Pros and Cons of Beat Detective

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Find answers to the most common questions about the recording process
faq.noAnswerDesc: If you have any specific questions about your project or the recording process, don't hesitate to contact me directly. I'll be happy to help.
faq.q1: What does the online drum recording service consist of?
faq.a1: It consists of professionally recording acoustic drums for your songs. We can record drums for your tracks. Using modern technology, we can do this from our studio with maximum quality and deliver the recording online anywhere in the world, saving up to 70% of costs while achieving professional sound.
faq.q2: What studio equipment do you use?
faq.a2: The best. Microphones, drums, snares, etc. You can see it in our 'Studio' section.
faq.a3: Toni Mateos. With over 35 years of experience and more than 1000 recorded albums, including John Legend, Alejandro Sanz, Jarabe de Palo, Raphael, Rozalén, Antonio Orozco, Pastora Soler...
faq.a4: Most styles: pop, rock, funk, jazz, blues, swing, R&B, hip hop, rap, folk, country, ballad, salsa, samba, bossa nova, Latin rhythms, etc. We currently do not record metal.
faq.q5: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee?
faq.a5: Absolutely. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund 100% of your money.
faq.a6: You decide, by configuring the recording session that best suits your needs.
faq.q7: My country's currency is not the euro. Is that a problem?
faq.a7: No. We accept payments from any country in the world.
faq.a8: Via PayPal, bank transfer, or credit card.
faq.q9: Can we discuss the details before recording?
faq.a9: Of course. We'd love to connect with you via WhatsApp or email so you can tell us in detail what kind of sound you're looking for. If you need a video call, you can request one in our price configurator.
faq.q10: How will I receive the recording?
faq.a10: After recording for you, you'll receive an email to download all the tracks.
faq.a11: No, we record multi-tracks, ready for you to mix yourself.
faq.a12: Yes, quantised with Beat Detective so they're perfectly in time and error-free. Ready to mix.
faq.q13: What if I don't like something about the recording?
faq.q14: Can I request a free sample of your tracks?
faq.a14: Yes, you can download sample tracks in the 'Download a Sample' section.
faq.q15: How long will it take to receive the tracks?
faq.a15: You can decide in our price configurator.
faq.q16: Are the tracks processed with any EQ, compression or effects?
faq.q17: What format are the drum tracks in? Are they compatible with my DAW?
faq.a17: We send WAV files, fully compatible with any recording and mixing software (Pro Tools, Logic, Cubase, Reaper...).
faq.q18: What will be the bit/sample rate of the tracks?
faq.q19: How will I know which mics and preamps were used in my recording?
faq.a19: You'll receive a technical sheet detailing the microphones, preamps and converters used for each channel.
faq.q20: I have a song with drums already arranged (MIDI, loops...). Can you copy it exactly?
faq.a20: Yes, no problem. You'll need to select this option in our price configurator. You also have the option of us recording a very similar but not identical drum part (included in the basic plan), or recording an additional take with fresh new ideas.
faq.q21: I have a nearly finished song but haven't programmed the drums. Is that a problem?
faq.a21: No, we can compose the drums for your song. Contact us and we'll work out the details.
faq.q22: Does my song need to be recorded with a click/metronome?
faq.q23: What do I need to send for you to start recording my song?
faq.a23: Just a few things: a stereo WAV audio file of your song WITHOUT DRUMS; a stereo WAV audio file of your song with DRUMS ONLY (MIDI programming, loops, etc.); the bit/sample rate of your project; the exact tempo in BPMs (if the tempo varies, we'll need the tempo map .mid file).
faq.q24: Does my production need to be finished before you record the drums?
